reason: Enabling FIPS mode on an already installed RHEL 9 system requires adding the dracut fips module and booting with the fips=1 kernel parameter, which is not supported and can render the system unbootable or lock out access. The fix involves fundamental boot and cryptographic changes, making automated remediation unsafe.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; potential system unbootable; possible loss of SSH/console access; requires kernel reboot with fips flag; affects cryptographic subsystem
